description_long: This object is a dense cluster of ornamental flowers and grasses, featuring numerous pinkish-red composite blooms rising above a lush base of green foliage. The flowers are arranged in rounded clusters atop slender, upright stems, giving a vibrant and lively appearance. The foliage consists of a mix of long, narrow, grass-like leaves and broader, lanceolate leaves, creating a layered and naturalistic effect. The pink flowers are distributed unevenly, with some clusters more prominent and others partially obscured by the tall grasses. The overall form is bushy and irregular, mimicking a wildflower patch commonly found in urban parks or landscaped gardens. The coloration is dominated by green and pink, with subtle variations in leaf and flower tones.
description: A bushy cluster of pinkish-red flowers with tall, grass-like green foliage, resembling a wildflower patch. The flowers are arranged in rounded clusters atop slender stems, surrounded by dense, layered leaves.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dense cluster of pink flowers prominently above a thick base of green foliage, with the flowers mostly centered.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the tall, wispy grasses in the foreground, partially obscuring the pink flowers and showing more of the plant's spread.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the height and layering of the flowers, with several blooms extending outward and the foliage appearing more separated.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals more of the tall grasses and fewer visible flowers, with the pink blooms mostly peeking through the foliage.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration, forming rounded composite flower heads with overlapping layers and clear radial symmetry.
